title: Senior Financial Analyst - Angel One - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Angel One - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Angel One in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
